topics.label: Disassembly
topics.description: objdump -d, IDA Free, Ghidra. Read machine code as assembly.

topics.label: Dynamic Analysis
topics.description: GDB, strace, ltrace. Observe program behavior at runtime.

topics.label: Binary Patterns
topics.description: Recognize functions, loops, switches, and data structures in assembly.

topics.label: Patching
topics.description: Modify binary code and data. NOPing, jump redirection.
